title: SQL: initialization for MAL fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Entry');
UPDATE test_table SET name = NULL WHERE id = 1;
